latestEvent.what_happened: Sasha sent Oyi two messages the same day. First, the PDF-flow reply: confirmed the self-serve flow (findyourtoptalent.com -> Discover Your Top Talent -> optional Mission, Resource Mapping, Quality of Life assessments -> profile PDF -> bring to Oyi), zero setup, works today, with a soft pointer to the $1,500 dashboard proposal ("the PDFs are the taste of it"). Second, the full webinar proposal -- message 3 of the community-host sequence following Oyi's message-1 yes: 90 minutes live plus 30 minutes QA, date proposed ~Aug 6 (two weeks out) pending the community's preferred day/time, deliverables (zone of genius articulated with precision, an AI-ready professional profile, a monetization playbook), no persuasion (just a few minutes at the end on going deeper), what Sasha handles (structure, materials, follow-up, sales, payment processing), recording stays with the community, revenue share (33% of the first two products -- Productize Yourself and BUILT -- plus 90% of digital-product revenue like the $37 Top Talent Activation; revenue share not profit share; monthly payouts with per-sale reporting), honest turnout scenarios (~$100 at 7 people, ~$500 at 15, ~$1,800 at 30, becoming a monthly stream if it proves out), assets offered (landing page, promo email sequence, welcome email, anything else reasonably needed), yes to making it monthly once the format proves itself, and the nonprofit-funded cohort designed properly after webinar #1. Closed with a single bottomline ask: confirmation plus 1-2 date/time options. Both messages archived verbatim in the Outreach Message Bank (tagged pdf-flow-reply / community-host / EN and webinar-proposal-msg3 / community-host / EN). CRM row 1 and the community-webinar Offer Ledger row updated to proposal-sent-awaiting-date, follow-up 2026-07-26.
